requirement_topic.en: KC Electrical Safety Certification for EV Chargers
requirement_topic.zh: 电动汽车充电桩 KC 电气安全认证
requirement_topic.zht: 電動汽車充電樁 KC 電氣安全認證

summary.en: EV chargers supplied in South Korea must be checked against the Korean Electrical Appliances and Consumer Products Safety Control framework and applicable KATS/KC safety standards. KC electrical safety is compulsory where the charger model is within the regulated scope; it is not a voluntary mark for in-scope products. Evidence normally includes Korean safety testing, model classification, factory or importer responsibility, Korean labelling, and the KC mark before domestic sale or supply.
summary.zh: 在韩国供应的电动汽车充电桩须依据韩国《电气用品及生活用品安全管理》框架及适用的 KATS/KC 安全标准进行确认。若充电桩型号属于监管范围，KC 电气安全为强制要求，并非自愿标志。通常需要韩国安全测试、型号分类、工厂或进口商责任、韩文标签以及销售或供应前加贴 KC 标志。
summary.zht: 在韓國供應的電動汽車充電樁須依據韓國《電氣用品及生活用品安全管理》框架及適用的 KATS/KC 安全標準進行確認。若充電樁型號屬於監管範圍，KC 電氣安全為強制要求，並非自願標誌。通常需要韓國安全測試、型號分類、工廠或進口商責任、韓文標籤以及銷售或供應前加貼 KC 標誌。

standards_or_laws: Korean KC electrical appliance safety framework
KATS/KC safety standards for in-scope EV charging equipment
Electrical Appliances and Consumer Products Safety Control Act

summary.en: China uses the GB/T 18487 and GB/T 20234 series for EV conductive charging systems and connectors, and China Compulsory Certification applies to in-scope EV charging equipment under CNCA implementation rules. Chinese CCC or GB/T evidence is not a KC certificate and does not by itself authorise Korean market sale.
summary.zh: 中国采用 GB/T 18487 和 GB/T 20234 系列处理电动汽车传导充电系统及接口，适用范围内的充电设备还受 CNCA 实施规则下的中国强制认证约束。中国 CCC 或 GB/T 证据不是 KC 证书，不能单独授权在韩国市场销售。
summary.zht: 中國採用 GB/T 18487 和 GB/T 20234 系列處理電動汽車傳導充電系統及接口，適用範圍內的充電設備還受 CNCA 實施規則下的中國強制認證約束。中國 CCC 或 GB/T 證據不是 KC 證書，不能單獨授權在韓國市場銷售。

gap.en: A China-market charger must be reclassified under Korean KC rules before sale. The key gap is not only test data: Korea requires KC-route model approval, Korean responsible party and labelling, and evidence against KATS/KC safety requirements. Treat KC as compulsory where in scope, and do not describe it as optional certification.
gap.zh: 中国市场充电桩在韩国销售前须按韩国 KC 规则重新分类。差距不仅是测试数据：韩国要求按 KC 路径进行型号批准、设置韩国责任主体及标签，并提供针对 KATS/KC 安全要求的证据。适用范围内应将 KC 视为强制要求，不能描述为可选认证。
gap.zht: 中國市場充電樁在韓國銷售前須按韓國 KC 規則重新分類。差距不僅是測試數據：韓國要求按 KC 路徑進行型號批准、設置韓國責任主體及標籤，並提供針對 KATS/KC 安全要求的證據。適用範圍內應將 KC 視為強制要求，不能描述為可選認證。

mandatory_status.target: Compulsory where the EV charger falls within the Korean regulated electrical-safety scope; KC is not voluntary for in-scope products.
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory where covered by China CCC rules; GB/T evidence alone is not Korean KC evidence.

source.publisher: Korean Agency for Technology and Standards (KATS)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] In-scope EV chargers require Korean KC electrical safety certification before Korean sale or supply. Chinese CCC, CQC, CNAS or GB/T reports may support engineering review but do not replace KC approval.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 【仅供参考】适用范围内的电动汽车充电桩在韩国销售或供应前须取得韩国 KC 电气安全认证。中国 CCC、CQC、CNAS 或 GB/T 报告可作为工程评审资料，但不能替代 KC 批准。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 【僅供參考】適用範圍內的電動汽車充電樁在韓國銷售或供應前須取得韓國 KC 電氣安全認證。中國 CCC、CQC、CNAS 或 GB/T 報告可作為工程評審資料，但不能取代 KC 批准。
